creator: teodorsigaev@gmail.com
text:
Created attachment 238080
Whole cad/PrusaSlicer directory

Update to PrusaSlicer 2.5.0

Issues:
- files/patch-src_occt__wrapper_CMakeLists.txt
  is it correct to use CMAKE_INSTALL_PREFIX as replacement of hardcoded 
  /usr/local?
- files/patch-patch-src_slic3r_GUI_GUI__App.cpp
  Current wx32-gtk3-3.2.1 segfaults on wxString() call without args, it crashes
  in /usr/src/contrib/llvm-project/libcxx/include/string:2426  (freebsd 13.1p3). 
  I didn't find a solution except commenting out the block of searching of 
  best translation and and set translation to NULL. But it works well.
